message:
fix(pages): prevent duplicate unlock requests and harden SW registration

Add in-flight guards and request ID tracking to auth flow to prevent
double-unlock from concurrent form submit/click handlers. Scope COI
setup keys per archive URL. Refactor sw-register.js with lazy
registration resolution, MessageChannel helper, and async getRegistration.
Rewrite session.js for improved reliability (+150 lines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
